adventures.name: Grand Canyon Hiking Trip
adventures.notes: Explore the Bright Angel Trail and watch sunrise at Mather Point. Book campground in advance.

adventures.name: Tokyo Cherry Blossom Festival
adventures.notes: Visited Ueno Park and Chidorigafuchi. Cherry blossoms were at peak bloom. Stayed in Shibuya.

adventures.name: Scottish Highlands Road Trip
adventures.notes: Plan to visit Isle of Skye, Loch Ness, and Glen Coe. Need to research best driving routes.
